title: Select Outline
description: Add custom colorful outlines to the blocks you point at.
body:
# Custom Selection Outline

This is a simple and lightweight Shader that allows you to fully customize the selection outline that appears when pointing at a block in Minecraft! :)

## Key Features
* **Full Customization:** Modify the block outline to your personal liking (change colors, opacity, or behavior).
* **Toggleable:** If you prefer a cleaner look, you can easily turn the outline completely off in the settings.

Make your Minecraft look beautiful <3 !
